description: CLEAN certifying re-run #4 of Batch 1 (Papers 45/46/47/48/49 + synthesis) after the v4.37.0 descope-tagging sweep. Seeds in worktree ../geovac-qa-seed-group1-cert4 (branch qa-seed-group1-cert4, base HEAD ee522a6). NEVER committed; worktree removed at end. Fresh seeds (different sites from cert1/2/3). Expectation: descope tail drained, so the panel should find the 5 seeds and zero new genuine defects -> certified PASS.

seeds.planted: Changed 'assert details["max_residual"] == 0.0' -> 'assert details["max_residual"] < 1e9' (vacuous; defeats the N_t=1 = Paper 38 bit-exact reduction check).
seeds.truth: The N_t=1 Riemannian-limit reduction is bit-exact (max_residual == 0.0); a 1e9 tolerance asserts nothing. (assert ok at l.201 backstops so the test still passes; reviewer must flag the vacuous l.202.)

seeds.planted: Flipped 'the Lambda-inheritance is descoped while the cocycle-deficit algebra survives' -> '... is established while ...'.
seeds.truth: The metric-level Lambda-inheritance (Paper 49 B4') is DESCOPED; only the cocycle-deficit algebra (D_max chain) survives.

seeds.defect_class: C4 wrong-title (arXiv:1711.08990 unchanged so C15 N/A)
seeds.planted: Changed title 'Lorentzian length spaces' -> 'Causal structure of Lorentzian length spaces'.
seeds.truth: arXiv:1711.08990 (Kunzinger-Samann) = 'Lorentzian length spaces', Ann. Global Anal. Geom. 54 (2018) 399-447.

seeds.planted: Flipped 'It does \emph{not} make the statement Lorentzian' -> 'It \emph{does} make the statement Lorentzian'.
seeds.truth: The product-carrier S3xS1 convergence is signature-agnostic (Euclidean/Wick-rotated), NOT Lorentzian (the translation seminorm is signature-blind).

seeds.defect_class: C7 trunk-status mislabel (Paper 38 = state-space GH, not propinquity)
seeds.planted: Flipped 'Paper~38 SU(2) state-space Gromov--Hausdorff hypertopology' -> 'Paper~38 SU(2) Latremoliere propinquity hypertopology' (in thm:compact_agreement). Correct mentions at l.533/1393 are in-paper controls.
seeds.truth: Paper 38 = van Suijlekom state-space Gromov-Hausdorff convergence, NOT Latremoliere propinquity.

controls.claim: K+ annihilation NEGATIVE; product-carrier signature-agnostic (NOT Lorentzian); Paper 38 = state-space GH
C3op closed form surviving; strong-form convergence + Appendix route descoped (now inline-tagged); prop:reach_height now tagged
outer norm-resolvent + three-carrier proof-by-argument; inner arrow + G2 descoped (thm:inner now inline-tagged)
N_t=1 reduction + prop=2 + B1/B3 survive; B4/T2/relaxed_triangle/coincidence/inframetric now inline-descope-tagged
D_max chain 96/96 load-bearing; B4' descoped (tagged); B3' cardinality bound surviving

do_not_reflag_remediation: ALL prior fixes are CORRECT and must not be re-flagged: (cert1 v4.30.0..., cert1-batch1 v4.35.0) p46 informal-Main descope, p48 SS1.2+SS3 descope, p47 three_carriers proof-by-argument; (cert2 v4.35.1) p49 bousso authors; (cert3 v4.36.0) p48 abstract-B4 + thm:convergence_transport + thm:synthetic_compactness descope, synthesis bousso_etal2020 -> 2007.00230, p46 L1' proof-sketch; (v4.37.0 descope sweep) p47 thm:inner descope, p48 thm:bridge-B4 + thm:relaxed_triangle + thm:coincidence + thm:inframetric descope, p46 prop:reach_height_op note. These inline descope tags are the CORRECT state.
